auth.email_already_exists: A user with this email already exists.
auth.email_not_verified: Email address is not verified. Please check your inbox.
auth.account_inactive: Your account is deactivated. Please contact support.
auth.invalid_or_expired_token: The link is invalid or has expired.
auth.registration_success: Registration successful. Please check your email.
auth.email_verified: Email address verified. You can now log in.
auth.reset_email_sent: If the account exists, a reset link has been sent to your email.
auth.unauthorized: You are not logged in. Please log in.
auth.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.

validation.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.
validation.password_too_weak: Password must contain uppercase letters, lowercase letters, and numbers.
validation.first_name_too_short: First name must be at least 2 characters.
validation.last_name_too_short: Last name must be at least 2 characters.

email.verification_body: Click the button below to verify your email address and activate your account.
email.verification_footer: This link is valid for 24 hours. If you did not create an account on Rezz.ba, you can ignore this email.

general.internal_error: An error occurred. Please try again.
general.not_found: The requested resource was not found.
general.too_many_requests: Too many requests. Please try again in a few minutes.
